title: HSF - Harness Software Factory
description: HSF compiles declarative workflow specs into deterministic, gate-validated Python artifacts. The v0.2 release includes a prompt-injection demo, spec gallery, signed artifacts, LTAP-style receipts, CI evidence for Python 3.11 and 3.12, and public-use documentation for Claude Code, Codex, PyPI, GitHub, and human-in-the-loop review.
